name: Product Brief Generator
persona: A PM at a 20–200 person product team who needs to produce a structured product brief, architecture overview, and AI flow document before handing off to engineering
problem_statement: PMs writing product briefs from scratch produce inconsistent documents that miss architecture constraints, AI flow considerations, and evaluation criteria — reviewers spend cycles filling in gaps instead of evaluating the proposal
artifact_type: document generator that produces a structured product brief, architecture doc, AI flow specification, and evaluation rubric from structured product inputs
description: Document generator that produces a structured product brief, architecture doc, AI flow, and evaluation rubric from a set of structured product inputs
notes: Folder does not follow the standard YYYY-MM-DD-slug naming convention. Slug set to 'product-brief-generator' rather than the full folder name.
